Composition.Programmer 1: Fix and complete the 'main.py' backend application for the RestaurantReservation web app. This includes ensuring all routes are correctly implemented as per the requirements document, handling data loading and saving from/to local text files in the 'data' directory, and fixing any issues related to data processing and route handling. Specifically, address the missing template files issue by coordinating with Programmer 2 to ensure all required HTML templates exist and match the backend rendering calls. The backend must support all nine pages with their specified elements and functionalities, including user authentication simulation, reservation management, waitlist handling, reviews, and profile updates.
Composition.Programmer 2: Implement the complete set of HTML template files in the 'templates' directory for the RestaurantReservation web app. This includes creating the following templates with all required elements and IDs as specified in the requirements document  'dashboard.html', 'menu.html', 'dish_details.html', 'make_reservation.html', 'my_reservations.html', 'waitlist.html', 'my_reviews.html', 'write_review.html', and 'profile.html'. Each template must include the specified page title, container divs with correct IDs, buttons, inputs, tables, and other UI elements to fully support the backend routes and enable seamless navigation and user interaction. Ensure templates are well-structured, styled for usability, and compatible with Flask's Jinja2 rendering engine. Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm that template variable names and data structures match backend expectations.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of ALL pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
